input.question: Show average content rating vs professor rating for each professor

payload.question: Show average content rating vs professor rating for each professor

output.sql:
SELECT
  professor_name AS professor,
  ROUND(AVG(content_rating), 2) AS avg_content_rating,
  ROUND(AVG(professor_rating), 2) AS avg_professor_rating,
  COUNT(*) AS review_count
FROM reviews
WHERE content_rating IS NOT NULL AND professor_rating IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY professor_name
ORDER BY professor;

visualization.description: Average content rating vs average professor rating for each professor (dot size = number of reviews).
visualization.title: Average Content Rating vs Average Professor Rating by Professor

payload.sql:
SELECT
  professor_name AS professor,
  ROUND(AVG(content_rating), 2) AS avg_content_rating,
  ROUND(AVG(professor_rating), 2) AS avg_professor_rating,
  COUNT(*) AS review_count
FROM reviews
WHERE content_rating IS NOT NULL AND professor_rating IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY professor_name
ORDER BY professor;
